feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: ITT yfw a Bulgarian replies to your post
entry.content: ITT yfw a Bulgarian replies to your post

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: What will happen to Steam following an economic collapse?
entry.content: An economic collapse is just around the corner; when it happens, you won’t even be able to afford food, let alone waste money on video games. So what will happen to Steam? Will it leave the US?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I'm still fucking mad. It's been 13 fucking years, and I'm still mad. I'm so mad…
entry.content: I'm still fucking mad. It's been 13 fucking years, and I'm still mad. I'm so mad, I wish they never made Thieves in Time at all. The worst part about that fucking game is that Sanzaru got the core gameplay and level design completely right, so you keep being pulled through the shitty ancestor gimmicks, minigames and truly dogshit story that couldn't be any worse if it were deliberate ragebait. If I must make an obligatory food analogy, I'd say it's like having a really nice chicken salad sandwic

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: magic the gathering arena
entry.content: >be me, casual enjoyer of playing games >feel like i want to play magic the gathering >download mtg arena >play traditional historic >opponent plays 3 mana 3/3 creature that allows you to cast any spell from your graveyard at the start of combat on your turn without paying its mana cost >oh thats basically the best card ever, what set is that from? >arena? you mean arena online only? >this is how every match goes >if you dont use the overpowered arena online only cards you just lose >low mana co

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Modder-friendly Minecraft remake made in C
entry.content: Hello /g/, I am making a modder-friendly Minecraft remake in C. I am designing the engine to be modders-first. The core game without any lua is extremely barebones and unplayable. What you see in pic rel is a result of the lua modding API. I want the modding API to be on par with GMod's modding API. I will implement features like asset loading into the engine to make modding incredibly powerful alongside creating and bundling incredibly useful libraries to make loading assets from other engines

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: the worst punishment you can give a living creature is force it to endure random…
entry.content: the worst punishment you can give a living creature is force it to endure random signals and noise, it feels like a shock or pain beyond what anything can really describe, its something that invades you, makes you feel guilty, breaks your spirit and after its over, you wonder if you're just gonna experience it again forever when you die, and it makes you want to kill yourself just to get it over with

No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /g/ Technology: >AI won't replace you. AI will supercharge your life. lol no The minute AI kills…
entry.content: >AI won't replace you. AI will supercharge your life. lol no The minute AI kills your labor value, you are stuck with the capital you have. Whatever capital that is, that is what you have until you die. Nothing more and nothing less.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: WiFi providers - who's your go to?
entry.content: thinking of getting a new provider; don't like starlink. Dish got fucked by a storm, don't want to buy another kit for just a stupid dish, location isn't good for it anyways because of trees. Any recommendations? What providers do you guys like? And any of them good for privacy, not needing me to buy a whole new kit/machine/whatever when something breaks, etc? I'm not very tech literate, so thought I'd ask. (I swear if I have to scroll through eight more years of dogshit youtube videos with some

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >music theory ruins enjoyment This is such an adorable brainlet cope. I always y…
entry.content: >music theory ruins enjoyment This is such an adorable brainlet cope. I always you see guys circlejerking it on here. First of all it's kind of weak to cling to enjoyment. There is plently in the world to enjoy, and the best sources of musical inspiration are always extramusical. Oftentimes learning music theory can disrupt enjoyment, but there's nothing to fear. You are simply being challenged to use that knowledge to feel music on a deeper level. You will get to a point where you consciously f

entry.content: /hmofa/ - Human Males On Female Anthros General #5024 >"Magic Birb Ritual" edition --Stories-- By Z3ldafan & VeeAnon >Morgan 64 https://mods.sm64coopdx.com/mods/cs -morgan-mconielson.1266/ By SpaceDimSum >Knead For Speed v003) https://spacedimsum.itch.io/bread By Oliver_Hart >The Leaves of Fall (Ch. 22) https://archiveofourown.org/works/6 3845776/ By TheEcstatic >Reconnection (Ch. 5) https://archiveofourown.org/works/7 7709536/ By fakklan >Grandest Strategist of the shortest Border War https://a

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: So now watch what happens. William Herschel discovers planet Uranus by accident.…
entry.content: So now watch what happens. William Herschel discovers planet Uranus by accident. This is after Newton's laws of gravity are published. So now we're tracking the orbit of Uranus. This is not following Newton's law. It's got some deviation. So maybe we found the distance limit over which Newton's laws would apply. That'd be interesting. But other people said Newton was so badass it must work, okay, even there. So instead of suggesting that his law was failing, clever people said maybe his law appl

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Why do niggers tongue my anus?
entry.content: Why do niggers tongue my anus?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Let's imagine that, in our galaxy of 400 billion suns, there's just us that thin…
entry.content: Let's imagine that, in our galaxy of 400 billion suns, there's just us that thinks, right? I mean, microbes all over the place, but in terms of things that think and can feel and, in a very real sense, bring meaning to the universe. All these things we've talked about, the beauty of these galaxies, they're not beautiful if there's nothing there to perceive them, right? They're just galaxies. So if that's it in this galaxy, then the decisions that we make now as a civilization have galactic impli

entry.title: /g/ Technology: DO NOT UPDATE YOUR MACINTOSH!!!
entry.content: APPLE DIED ON OCTOBER 5 2011. STEVE JOBS WAS ENTRUSTED WITH THE KEYS TO THE UNIX BY BELL LABORATORIES . ALL OTHER UNIXES ARE LUCIFERIAN PERVERSIONS. DO NOT USE A MACINTOSH NEWER THAN LION OR YOU WILL DAMN YOUR SOUL. APPLE DID NOT HOLD A VALID ELECTION WHEN TIM CROOK TOOK POWER, THEREFORE, THE SEAT OF APPLE HAS BEEN VACANT SINCE MMXI. TIM COOK IS NOT THE BISHOP OF CUPERTINO

entry.title: /b/ Random: Someone tried doxxing me over a week ago, and they have not seemed to have given…
entry.content: Someone tried doxxing me over a week ago, and they have not seemed to have given up. I did a little investigating on my own and found their friends address, but I have hit a roadblock. I checked cracked.st and there does not seem to be such services offered. (Obligatory in Minecraft) does anyone know where such services are offered? I would be willing to pay quite well to put this to rest. My session is attached below and you may leave any preferred communication in this thread. 05ef691a7fef209a

Her day commences in the haze of whatever free drugs and booze she imbibed, boofed and snorted the previous day. She can barely make out all the notifications from thirsty dudes literally from all over the world. There's a vast underclass of swarthy men stretching from here to bumfuck Bangladesh who like, comment and follow a girl like this,

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Home Folder
entry.content: How do you organize your home folder? Do you just use the defaults given by whatever you use, or do you set it up yourself? The one kinda different thing I do is put all the programming stuff I'm actively working on in a folder called "prog", and all the program files for downloaded/completed programs I use in a folder called "gram"

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: GloryBot - Discord gloryhole bot
entry.content: GloryBot is an anonymous chatbot that quietly pairs you up with another member for a private one-on-one conversation, and neither of you ever sees who the other is. You talk through the bot's DMs and it carries your messages back and forth. https://discord.gg/3B2DR9hEKh

entry.title: /o/ Auto: We had no idea how good we had it even just 10-15 years ago. Something like picr…
entry.content: We had no idea how good we had it even just 10-15 years ago. Something like picrel would have only been a few thousand and parts were literally everywhere. Has anyone else been nearly priced out of this hobby? It's not even fun anymore.
